title: Cross-source dedup keeps only the highest-priority source per {competition, season}
evidence: src/bsoccer_query.erl:524-547 canonical/1 + pick_source/1 discard every row from lower-priority files in a bucket; if the priority source is missing matches present only in another file, those matches are dropped
suggestion: Dedup at match granularity (e.g. by {date, home_ident, away_ident, score}) so unique matches from secondary sources are retained

title: Date-range filtering exposed only on search_matches
evidence: src/bsoccer_mcp.erl:209-220 match_statistics and :170-180 team_record accept season/season_from/season_to but no date_from/date_to; date_ok/2 (src/bsoccer_query.erl:347) is wired only into match_predicate
suggestion: Optionally accept date_from/date_to on team_record and match_statistics for parity

title: Player search-by-name path not directly asserted
evidence: test/bsoccer_tests.erl player tests cover nationality (t_search_players_brazil:206) and club (t_search_players_by_club:195) but no test passes a 'name' argument, though player_predicate/1 (src/bsoccer_query.erl:362) implements it
suggestion: Add a test asserting search_players(#{<<"name">> => <<"Neymar">>}) returns the expected player
